bounded_parameters.note: Griess / 196884 is formalized in Lean and gnosis-math. This witness anchors the v0 RTL contract: finite resolution-lift FSM (admission / observer lift). High-dimensional algebra-shaped state on silicon is expected to follow the repo **liquid memory** model (banked external memory, streaming/range phases)—see docs/MONSTER_MESH_70B_OPERATIONS.md and open-source/knotgraph/src/layer-cache/—not a naive dense flip-flop array.
